scripts.check:boundaries: bun run check:runtime-only-root && bun run check:workspace-boundaries
scripts.build: bun run build:node && bun run build:execution && bun run build:theme && bun run build:config && bun run build:contracts && bun run build:widget-runtime && bun run build:basic-kit && bun run build:authoring && bun run build:context-menu && bun run build:context-menu-builtins && bun run build:shortcuts && bun run build:undo-redo && bun run build:leafergraph
scripts.test:core: bun run test:node && bun run test:execution && bun run test:theme && bun run test:contracts && bun run test:widget-runtime && bun run test:basic-kit && bun run test:authoring && bun run test:context-menu && bun run test:context-menu-builtins && bun run test:shortcuts && bun run test:undo-redo && bun run test:leafergraph
scripts.test:smoke:examples: bun run build:minimal-graph && bun run check:authoring-basic-nodes && bun run build:authoring-basic-nodes
scripts.test:smoke:templates: bun run --filter @template/authoring-node-template check && bun run --filter @template/authoring-node-template build && bun run --filter @template/authoring-text-widget-template check && bun run --filter @template/authoring-text-widget-template build && bun run --filter @template/authoring-browser-plugin-template check && bun run --filter @template/authoring-browser-plugin-template build
scripts.test:smoke: bun run test:smoke:examples && bun run test:smoke:templates
scripts.test: bun run check:boundaries && bun run test:core && bun run test:smoke
